sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 10.67 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.10)

statement.latex: The class$LN{ M}_p$of locally nilpotent groups admitting a splitting automorphism of prime order$p$(for definition see 10.59) is a variety of groups with operators (E.\,I.\,Khukhro, Math. USSR Sbornik, 58 (1987), 119--126).
